overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing first-person exploration through a dark, foggy mountain canyon at night. The player character walks through narrow rocky passages lined with dead trees, gradually approaching a dramatic source of light beams piercing through the mist from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with steep cliff walls

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark narrow canyon with high rock walls on both sides

entered.detail: steep dark rock face forming the left wall of the canyon
steep dark rock face forming the right wall of the canyon
tall bare trees with no leaves lining the left side of the path
thick blue-tinted fog reducing visibility down the canyon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a very dark, narrow canyon with steep rock walls pressing in from both sides. Dead pine trees stand on the left while mist obscures the path ahead. The camera moves forward steadily through the enclosed rocky passage with minimal light.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening forest trail with dead trees approaching light source

events.description: exiting the tightest canyon section into a slightly wider tree-lined passage
distant light beams become visible through the fog ahead, illuminating the mist

agents.ego_description: continuing along the grassy path as the canyon opens slightly and light becomes visible in the distance

entered.detail: vertical god rays of light piercing downward through the fog in the distance
tall grass and vegetation covering the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The path widens slightly as the camera moves through a grassy area with dead trees receding into the distance on the left. The right cliff wall falls behind as dramatic light beams become visible through the fog ahead, signaling an opening in the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon area with dramatic light beams piercing through mist

events.description: entering the area illuminated by strong vertical light beams shining through the fog

agents.ego_description: approaching the source of the bright light beams shining down through the canyon mist

entered.detail: large boulder formation on the right side of the path
bright light source at the canyon opening creating visible god rays

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wider area dominated by dramatic light beams piercing vertically through the mist. The camera approaches the light source at the end of the canyon, with rocky terrain underfoot and the steep walls now visible only in the far distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, dark canyon that gradually opens into a vast space illuminated by celestial light. It begins within a narrow rocky passage where steep walls press in from both sides and dead pine trees stand shrouded in thick mist. As the camera moves forward, the path widens into a grassy area where the cliff walls recede and the first dramatic beams of light begin to pierce through the fog ahead. The scene then expands into a wide basin dominated by vertical shafts of light cutting through the mist, with the rocky terrain opening up as the steep canyon walls fade into the far distance.
